report.summary: Community growth cycle v13 (Mar 17 Eve): FOMC eve cycle — 5 new Twitter posts (dot plot scenario thread, GPU Compute guide launch, DeFi Insurance guide launch, stablecoin yield + rate hold angle, FOMC countdown); Discord evening update with new guide announcements; newsletter section updated with 3 new guides (GPU Compute, DeFi Insurance, Yield-Bearing Stablecoins); 2 social cards created (FOMC dot plot 3-scenario card + GPU Compute Networks protocol comparison card); posting schedule updated through Mar 22.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet 1 (Tue Eve): FOMC dot plot scenario THREAD (5 posts) — 0 cuts = bear ($68-70K), 1 cut = base ($72-75K), 2 cuts = bull ($76-78K); 7/8 FOMC sell pattern from 2025; 'Don't react to the first candle' CTA; links to /learn/fomc-fed-rate-crypto-guide

Tweet 2 (Tue Eve): GPU Compute Networks guide launch — $100B AI compute market going decentralized; Akash (85% cost savings), Render (3D/AI), io.net (1M+ GPUs), Bittensor (decentralized ML); CTA to /learn/decentralized-gpu-compute-networks-guide

Tweet 3 (Tue Eve): DeFi Insurance guide launch — <2% of DeFi TVL insured ($180B+ unprotected); Nexus Mutual ($700M+ cover), OpenCover, Neptune Mutual, InsurAce; CTA to /learn/defi-insurance-guide-2026

Tweet 4 (Tue Eve): Stablecoin yield + FOMC hold — 98% hold probability means stablecoin yields stay attractive; tokenized treasuries 4-5%, DeFi lending above TradFi; CTA to /learn/yield-bearing-stablecoins

Tweet 5 (Tue Eve): FOMC countdown — 18h to Powell; BTC $73,700 on 8-day streak; last rally-into-FOMC gave back 8% before recovering; 'Set alerts, don't set market orders'; links to FOMC guide + DCA calc

Discord/Telegram (Tue Eve): Evening update — 2 new guides (GPU Compute + DeFi Insurance) with descriptions and links; FOMC decision reminder for tomorrow 2PM ET; BTC $73,700 holding, no fade into close

Newsletter additions (Thu Mar 19): 3 new guide spotlights added — GPU Compute Networks (AI × crypto thesis), DeFi Insurance 2026 (<2% insured angle), Yield-Bearing Stablecoins (sDAI/USDe/USDM comparison)

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-fomc-eve-dot-plot-scenarios.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark theme; LIVE + date badge; 'FOMC DOT PLOT: 3 SCENARIOS FOR CRYPTO' title in brand gradient; BTC $73,700 + ETH +13% pills; 3 glass-morphism scenario cards (BULL 2 cuts → $76-78K green, BASE 1 cut → $72-75K amber, BEAR 0 cuts → $68-70K red) each with probability bars; bottom tagline 'Don't react to the first candle' + FOMC guide URL. Saved to /public/social-fomc-eve-dot-plot-scenarios.svg

social-gpu-compute-networks.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark theme; NEW GUIDE badge; 'DECENTRALIZED GPU COMPUTE NETWORKS' title; 4 protocol cards (Akash cyan/85% savings, Render purple/Solana, io.net amber/1M+ GPUs, Bittensor indigo/subnet arch); market context bar ($100B AI compute, $1T Nvidia demand, AI×Crypto thesis, SURGING status); bottom tagline about permissionless AI infra. Saved to /public/social-gpu-compute-networks.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: FOMC Eve (Mar 17 evening): Decision in ~18 hours. BTC $73,700 holding with no fade into close — 8-day streak intact. Market cap $2.65T. Fear index at 28 (improving).

New content pipeline: 2 guides built today (GPU Compute 220 lines + DeFi Insurance 186 lines) + yield-bearing-stablecoins promoted to published (408 total slugs). PUBLISH_QUEUE has 2 items awaiting next cycle.
AI narrative catalyst: Jensen Huang $1T chip demand prediction driving AI token rally. GPU Compute guide is perfectly timed — first social amplification in this cycle.
DeFi insurance angle: <2% of $180B+ DeFi TVL insured is a strong contrarian hook. Under-covered topic with low competition.
Site is Day 57, GSC Day 18+ — organic clicks expected to start materializing. 408 published pages. FOMC content timed for organic arrival window.

Posting schedule: Tue Eve new guide tweets (2) + FOMC eve thread + yield angle + countdown → Wed AM FOMC eve reminder → Wed PM post-decision reaction → Thu newsletter with 3 new guides → Fri poll → Sat BTCFi → Sun Aave V4
